versions.title: Criminal Justice System
versions.description: A full crime and punishment economy. Rob enough times and you become a wanted criminal with escalating penalties. Fund the police, report criminals, and watch the streets get cleaned up — or don't, and risk everything.

groups.title: Criminal Levels
items: Robbing someone makes you a criminal — each subsequent rob increases your level (max 5)
Level 1 Wanted: -30% earnings, 7 days | Level 2 Felon: -40%, 14 days | Level 3 Fugitive: -50%, 21 days
Level 4 Public Enemy: -60%, 28 days | Level 5 Police Target: -70%, permanent until caught
Earnings penalty applies to daily, work, and beg — your criminal record is shown every time
Criminal level resets when you're caught

groups.title: Police & Catch System
items: Catch chance per rob scales with the police fund size — 0 fund: ~3%, 1M: ~33%, 1T: ~63%, 1Q: ~78%
Higher criminal level = higher catch probability on each rob attempt
Level 1-2 bust: wallet seized | Level 3-5 bust: wallet + bank + tokens all seized
Police patrol random NPCs periodically — keeps the streets busy even between player crimes
Top donor gets credited in every arrest announcement

groups.title: .report & .fund
items: .report @user — costs 3 tokens, recovers all coins stolen from you, rewards up to 5 bonus tokens
Reporting triggers an immediate police bust on the criminal
.fund police <amount> — donate coins to the police fund
Every 1B donated gives +2% work earnings bonus (max +30%)
Rob protection can't shield you from people you've already robbed

versions.title: Event Cards & Polish
versions.description: Weekly rotating event cards with animated drops, fused card durability drain, profile card emoji icons, and a round of bug fixes across cards, formatting, and the website.

groups.title: Weekly Event Cards
items: A new limited event card rotates every Monday — different card each week based on the week number
8% chance to drop the event card during any .cardroll if you haven't claimed it this week
Event drops use the fusion GIF animation so you know something special happened
Event cards never lose durability from use — they're permanent once you have them
.card event — shows the current week's event card, when it rotates, and whether you own it

groups.title: Fused Card Durability Drain
items: Fused cards now lose durability each time their bonus is applied during gameplay
Drain per use by tier: Mythical -0.15%, Legendary -0.05%, Rare -0.05%, Uncommon -0.05%, Common -0.02%
When a fused card reaches 0% it automatically re-rolls into a fresh copy of the same tier
.cards limited now shows remaining durability % for every fused card in your collection

groups.title: Card System Fixes
items: .cards burn now stops giving bonus rolls after 3 burns — dust is still always awarded regardless
.cards limited was showing NaN% and undefined% for cards fused before the durability system launched — fixed with defaults
.cards limited now includes an info section explaining what 0% durability does and how event cards work

groups.title: Profile & Wallet
items: Profile card stat icons replaced — colored dots swapped for actual emoji icons (⚡ XP, 💬 Chat, 🪙 Coins, 🏦 Bank, 🎫 Tokens)
Wallet card token field now shows a 🎫 icon next to your token balance instead of a bare T abbreviation

groups.title: Rob Overhaul
items: Max rob amount now scales with your rebirth level — R0 caps at 100K, R10 at ~3B, R20 at ~100T, R24 at ~6Q
Success chance scales with the rebirth gap between you and your target — ±2% per level, clamped between 40% and 95%
Steal card bonuses now improve your success chance in addition to the amount stolen
Catch penalty scales with rebirth level — higher rebirth means a bigger fine if you get caught (30% base, +1% per level, max 60%)

groups.title: Bug Fixes
items: Number formatting was showing spaces as thousand separators (e.g. '1 000 000') — fixed by passing 'en-US' locale explicitly across all 269 number format calls
Marketplace website pack cards now show animated fan thumbnails instead of a plain emoji icon
New commands from recent updates added to the .help index under their correct sections

versions.title: Card Packs, Fusion & TV
versions.description: Pokemon-style card packs with animated per-card reveals, card fusion to upgrade duplicates, live TV streaming into voice channels, and a new gambling limit expander for high-rollers.

groups.title: Card Packs
items: 4 pack tiers: Bronze (2T), Silver (5T), Gold (15T), Mythic (50T) — all purchased with Tokens on the website
Bronze — 3 random cards at standard pull rates
Silver — 5 cards, guaranteed at least 1 Rare or better
Gold — 8 cards, guaranteed at least 1 Legendary or better
Mythic — 10 cards, guaranteed 1 Mythical
New Card Packs tab on the marketplace website with pack shop, inventory display, and per-tier pack art
.cardpack — view your pack inventory and open counts
.cardpack open <type> — open a pack directly in Discord

groups.title: Pack Opening Experience
items: Each card reveals one at a time with an animated flip GIF before showing the full card
React ✅ on a card to keep it, ❌ to discard it — you choose every single card
Discarded cards are permanently removed from your collection
30 second timeout per card — defaults to keep if you don't react
Summary at the end shows kept vs discarded counts and tier breakdown

groups.title: Card Fusion
items: .cards fuse <tier> — sacrifice multiple cards of the same tier to roll one card of the next tier up
Fusion costs: 5 Commons → 1 Uncommon, 4 Uncommons → 1 Rare, 3 Rares → 1 Legendary, 2 Legendaries → 1 Mythical
Auto-selects your worst copies first (highest serial ratio) so you don't have to pick manually
Fused cards get a fresh serial number from the next-tier pool
Cannot fuse equipped or marketplace-listed cards

groups.title: TV Streaming
items: .source <channel> — stream a live TV channel directly into your voice channel
4 HLS satellite channels added: Disney XD, Nick Jr., Boomerang, Nickelodeon
Disney XD switched from YouTube search to a 24/7 HLS satellite stream
All new channels use reliable m3u8 streams — no YouTube dependency
.source list — browse all channels | .source stop — stop stream | .source vol <n> — volume 0–200

groups.title: Gambling Limit Expander
items: New upgrade purchasable on the Marketplace website under Store Items
Raises the 2-hour gambling win cap across all gambling commands
6 tiers: Standard → High Roller → Whale → Mega Whale → Titan → Unlimited
Each tier multiplies the base 500B cap — Unlimited removes the cap entirely
Applies to slots, blackjack, plinko, mines, ladders, dice, coinstreak, rune, and diffuser

versions.title: Roblox Cards
versions.description: Collect, trade, and equip Roblox limited item cards for real gameplay bonuses. Pull cards daily, build your collection, and trade on the marketplace.

groups.title: Card Collection System
items: .cardroll — pull a random classic Roblox limited card (5 free rolls per day)
2,500+ real Roblox limiteds in the pool sourced from Rolimons — Dominus, Valkyrie, Headless Horseman, and more
5 rarity tiers: Common, Uncommon, Rare, Legendary, Mythical — based on real RAP values
Every card gets a unique serial number — lower serial = better bonus
Animated spin GIF on card pull that reveals your card
Canvas-rendered card images matching the bot's visual style

groups.title: Card Bonuses
items: Equip up to 3 cards (expandable to 8) for active gameplay bonuses
8 bonus types: gambling, fishing, daily, work, XP, cooldown reduction, rob protection, all income
Bonuses stack across equipped cards — serial #1 cards give up to 1.5x the base bonus
Cooldown reduction applies to fishing, beg, work, slots, blackjack, plinko, mines, and ladders
Rob protection reduces the attacker's success chance
XP bonus multiplies both command usage and chat message XP gains

groups.title: Card Marketplace
items: .cardmarket — browse, list, buy, delist, and search card listings
5% seller tax on all sales
Full marketplace tab on the website — browse cards, buy, and list for sale
Card collection synced to your profile for website viewing

groups.title: Passes & Upgrades (Website)
items: Card Roll Pass — increase daily rolls from 5 up to Unlimited (6 tiers, purchased with Tokens)
Card Slot Expander — add +1 equip slot for 5 Tokens each (base 3, max 8)
Both purchasable on the Marketplace website under Store Items

versions.title: Reimagine
versions.description: Ncorp gets a complete rework. 80+ commands cut, the economy rebalanced from the ground up, gambling bonuses soft-capped, and the bot refocused on what people actually use: gambling, fishing, and TTS. Less bloat, more depth.

groups.title: Economy Rebalance
items: All bonus multipliers now stack additively with diminishing returns instead of multiplying on top of each other
Soft cap: bonuses up to 200% apply fully, 200-500% at half value, 500%+ at quarter value
Rebirth hard-capped at level 10 — no more infinite scaling
Balance compression applied to all accounts — inflated trillions scaled down to reasonable amounts
All existing progress (rod levels, pets, rank, tokens) preserved — only cash was adjusted
This affects daily, work, beg, and all gambling winnings

groups.title: Commands Removed
items: 80+ commands cut to reduce bloat and sharpen the bot's identity
Removed: companies, marriage, family, sex system, crushes, side jobs, crystals, runes, homes, AFK, VC transcription/stats, most image filters, wordle, quiz, math, roblox commands
Kept image filters: deepfry, invert, mirror, blur, pixelate, addtext, flip
Everything that matters stays: gambling, fishing, TTS, economy, pets, profile, leaderboards, rep, weather, urban, wiki, translate, YouTube notifications

groups.title: New Commands
items: .setbio <text> — set your profile bio directly from the bot (no website needed)
.cmdstats [@user] — see your top 15 most-used commands with usage percentages

groups.title: Server Join Rework
items: New owner DM on join — now lists every feature category (economy, gambling, fishing, pets, TTS, image tools) with actual command examples
Shows server member count and prefix in the DM footer

groups.title: Website Cleanup
items: Bio editing now available via bot command (.setbio) in addition to the website
Website remains the place for themes, badges, voices, and token purchases

versions.title: The Big One
versions.description: The largest update in Incorp's history. Rebuilt progression from the ground up, added 5 gambling games, a full company simulator, interactive bank heists, 15 image effects, real-time voice transcription, a smart AFK system, and a completely new anti-cheat layer — plus dozens of bug fixes across the board.

groups.title: XP & Rank System — Full Overhaul
items: 11-tier rank ladder: Novice → Apprentice → Adept → Expert → Master → Grandmaster → Legend → Mythic → Divine → Celestial → Transcendent
Each rank carries a permanent earnings multiplier — starts at 1.0x, reaches 1.75x at Transcendent
Rank-up reward: +1 Token per level reached
Global XP = server messages + commands used, both tracked separately with anti-spam cooldowns
Profile card shows an XP progress bar between your current rank and the next threshold
Toggle rank-up notification DMs on or off in your settings

groups.title: Job Level System
items: 10-tier job progression tied to .work: Intern → Employee → Senior Employee → Team Lead → Manager → Director → VP → C-Suite → CEO → Industry Legend
Payout multiplier scales from 1.0x (Intern) to 3.0x (Industry Legend)
XP earned each work session; automatic level-up with an in-chat announcement
.joblevel / .job — view your current tier, XP progress, and next milestone

groups.title: Rebirth System
items: Unlimited rebirth levels — each rebirth resets your wallet and bank to 0 in exchange for permanent stacking multipliers
Bonuses per level: +20% daily reward, +15% work payout, +10% beg payout, +5% rare fish chance, +10% slots winnings, +20% XP gain
Cost scales 2.5x per rebirth starting at 100,000 coins
Must type 'confirm' within 30 seconds — 5-minute pending lock prevents balance transfer exploits before it fires
Rebirth level shown as [RN] tag on the leaderboard

groups.title: Upgrade System — Expanded to 11
items: multiplier — +10% all earnings per level (max 20, starts 100K coins)
cooldown — -5% work and beg cooldown per level (max 5, starts 250K)
bank — unlocks your bank account (1 level, 1M coins)
fishing — +15% fishing rewards per level (max 10, starts 500K)
gambling — +12% gambling winnings per level (max 5, starts 750K)
protection — -15% coins lost to robbery per level (max 10, starts 1.5M)
interest — +0.5% daily bank interest per level (max 5, starts 5M — requires bank upgrade)
vault — +25% of your balance shielded from robbery per level (max 4, starts 10M)
xp — +20% XP gain per level (max 8, starts 2.5M)
company — unlocks the company system with +10% income bonus (1 level, 50M coins)
energy — -5% energy usage per level (max 10, starts 200K)

groups.title: Gambling — System Overhaul
items: 500 billion coin win cap per 2-hour rolling window, enforced across all 7 gambling commands
Cap is checked before the game runs — you're blocked upfront rather than silently losing winnings
Window state saved to disk and survives bot restarts
Gambling upgrade bonus and rebirth multiplier both apply multiplicatively to all wins
Slots reels fully reweighted with realistic odds: Cherry 35%, Orange 25%, Lemon 20%, Diamond 12%, 7 6%, Jackpot 2%
Personal gambling toggle — disable all gambling commands for yourself in settings
Bet limit setting — set your own per-command maximum

groups.title: Whale Pass
items: 6-tier purchasable upgrade in the marketplace that expands your 2-hour gambling win cap
Tier 1 — 1T cap (2 tokens) | Tier 2 — 1.5T cap (5 tokens) | Tier 3 — 2T cap (10 tokens)
Tier 4 — 2.5T cap (20 tokens) | Tier 5 — 3T cap (40 tokens) | Tier 6 — Unlimited (150 tokens)
Tiers are sequential — must own the previous to unlock the next
DM sent on purchase confirming your new tier name and adjusted cap
.gl / .gamble limit — shows your current tier and cap at any time

groups.title: New Gambling Commands
items: .dice <amount> — roll 1–6; high (4–6) wins 2x, low (1–3) loses; 10s cooldown
.duel @user [amount] — PvP dice duel; opponent has 60 seconds to .accept; higher roll wins the pot, ties refund both; 30s cooldown
.rune — rune-based gambling with a 52% base win rate and escalating reward tiers
.diffuser — bomb diffuser game; pick the right wire each round to build a multiplier, wrong wire loses everything
.coinstreak — consecutive coinflip streak game; winning streak builds a multiplier

groups.title: Rob System — Reworked
items: 70% base success chance with a 10-second suspense delay before the outcome is revealed
Catch penalty: lose 30% of the attempted amount if caught
Vault upgrade reduces how much of the target's balance is stealable
Wolf pet bonus adds a steal multiplier
rob_protect setting — toggle robbery immunity entirely in your settings
Simultaneous rob protection — you can't rob someone already being robbed by someone else

groups.title: Bank Interest — Passive Income
items: Interest fires automatically every hour, checked once per day per user
Rate: 0.5% per interest upgrade level, up to 2.5% at max level 5
Requires the bank account upgrade to be active
DMs you with the amount earned and your current rate each payout
Toggle interest payouts on or off with the bank_interest setting

groups.title: Fishing — Improvements
items: .fishquest [claim] — daily fishing quests with a target fish type and coin reward; progress tracked live during .fish sessions; collect with .fishquest claim on completion
Fish locations — cast in different spots (.fish <location>) with unique catch pools per location; your current location is shown in .fishstats
55-rod progression from Wooden to Omniversal — catch rate multiplier 1.0x–28.0x, rare chance 1.0x–9.0x, highest rods cost up to 18.5 billion coins
Fishing upgrade applies +15% rewards per level, stacking with rebirth multipliers

groups.title: Autofish — Improvements
items: Stats now tracked per session and all-time: fish caught, coins earned, rare caught, mythical caught
Auto-bait purchasing — .autofish bait <name> automatically buys bait when you run out; supports Fishing Bait, Basic Lure, and Premium Lure
Autofish messages excluded from XP tracking to prevent passive XP farming
2-hour daily limit window now persists across bot restarts

groups.title: Company System — Improved
items: Full business simulator — requires the Business License upgrade (50M coins) to unlock
.createcompany <name> <type> — found a Startup, Established, Enterprise, or Corporation; each has different base costs and income rates
.company — view your company's type, level, daily income, employees, departments, upgrades, and total investor capital
.collectincome — collect daily income (24h cooldown); Business License gives an additional +10% on top of all other upgrade bonuses
.upgradecompany <type> — upgrade Office, Marketing, Technology, or Staff; each tier multiplies your daily income
.invest <amount> @user — invest in another player's company; investors receive a proportional share of profits on each collect
.hire @user <position> / .unhire — hire and fire employees with named role assignments
.createdepartment <type> — add departments to open additional income streams
.companies — browse all active companies across all players
.companystats — full financial breakdown of your company

groups.title: Bank Heist System — Improved
items: .robbank — multi-stage interactive heist; the bank opens 4 windows per day at UTC 0–2, 6–8, 12–14, and 18–20; only one heist runs at a time
Navigate real-time obstacles as a progress bar fills to 100%; full completion rewards a 1.5x loot multiplier
Loot scales with your wallet balance — up to 3x base at high wealth levels
.bankstatus — check whether the bank is currently open or closed and when the next window opens
.bankdebt / .paydebt — failed heists leave a debt that must be cleared before certain actions are available
.robstats — view your personal heist record: successful heists, failed attempts, and total coins stolen

groups.title: Voice Chat Tools — New
items: .vcscribe / .vctranscribe — real-time voice chat transcription; logs every speaker's name and timestamp as they talk
.vcsummary — AI-generated summary of the current transcription session powered by Groq; outputs up to 8 concise bullet points

groups.title: Games — New
items: .connect4 / .c4 @user [bet] — canvas-rendered board with GIF playback on game end; play vs another user or a bot at 4 difficulty levels (noob / average / pro / expert); difficulty auto-scales with bet size; .c4 quit to forfeit
.tictactoe / .ttt [@user|bot] [bet] — canvas board with .place x:y to move; the bot uses fork detection, making it genuinely tricky in the mid-game
.wordle — classic 6-guess word game
.quiz — trivia with multiple choice answers
.wyr — Would You Rather; the server votes on two randomly selected scenarios
.guessemoji — guess the concept from emoji combinations

groups.title: Image Effects — Improved
items: 15 effects: .pixelate, .blur, .mirror, .invert, .deepfry, .glitch, .sepia, .sharpen, .swirl, .vignette, .implode, .bandicam, .legoify, .speechbubble / .sb, .addtext
All effects accept a reply to any image, a direct attachment, or a URL — consistent input handling across every single command
.effects — quick reference that lists every available effect in one message
.banner — view your own or any user's Discord profile banner link
.tools — quick-reference card grouping all image, media, voice, and TTS commands in one place
Legoify rewritten with programmatic LEGO brick textures — rounded base, raised stud with shading, and hard-light color tinting per cell; no longer flat colored blocks
Glitch implemented — row-based horizontal pixel shift on raw image data for a chromatic-style distortion

groups.title: TTS — Improvements
items: FIFO queue system — messages now process in strict order with no overlapping audio
URL stripping — links are replaced with just the domain name before being read aloud
Voice state announcements — the bot reads out join, leave, mute, and deafen events in VC
.ttsrate — adjustable speech speed via atempo filter
.ttsvolume — per-session volume adjustment
.ttsfun — enables voice effects and audio modifiers
Special character voices: ghostface, chewbacca, c3po, stitch, stormtrooper, rocket, and more via TikTok voice API
ElevenLabs 3,000 character daily limit enforced and tracked per user; usage persists across restarts

groups.title: AFK System — Improved
items: .afk [reason] — go AFK with an optional reason; anyone who mentions you will be notified automatically with how long you've been gone
AFK clears the moment you send any non-command message
Mention log on return — the bot posts a full list of who pinged you, in which channel, at what time, and a snippet of their message
Pinger notification — every unique user who mentioned you while you were away gets an in-chat alert that you're back
30-second per-channel cooldown per mentioned user to prevent immediate spam notifications
Spam protection — 5 AFK pings within 2 minutes auto-blacklists the sender for 2 hours

groups.title: User Settings — Expanded
items: 16 toggleable settings, all enforced at the command level before any command executes

passive_income, bank_interest, rob_protect, gambling, pvp_challenges, bet_limit, dm_notifs, cd_remind, lvlup_msg, public_profile, leaderboard, analytics, romance, family_invites, active_theme, equipped_flag
Settings that block a command show a clean denial message with a direct link to incorp.live/settings
Bio now set directly from the website marketplace — no bot command needed

groups.title: Anti-Cheat & Security
items: Suspicious activity monitoring across 18 commands: daily, work, fish, slots, blackjack, plinko, mines, spin, ladders, flip, rob, heist, diffuser, collectincome, sell, gamble, bet, cashout
Auto-flag thresholds: single gain over 2M coins, total wealth exceeding 50M (flagged once), or 1M+ gained within 15 seconds
Daily rotating command logs at ./logs/commands_{date}.log; suspicious events written to ./logs/suspicious.log
.auditlog — owner-only command to review recent suspicious events via DM
.checkuser — owner-only deep inspection of any user's full data
Bot account detection — auto temp-blacklists for 30 days and DMs the owner with account tag, command used, and channel
Command spam protection — 10 commands within 10 seconds triggers a 2-hour temp-blacklist
Blacklisted users who keep spamming commands stop receiving the block message after 2 warnings — the bot goes silent
Hourly snapshots of 14 critical data files; last 24 retained with automatic rotation (.snapshots / .restoreuser)

groups.title: Website
items: 404 page — proper not-found handling for missing pages
Settings page — full UI for all user preferences; speed test runs silently on login and submits ISP data
Marketplace — Whale Pass card in the Items tab; shows your current tier, the next tier's cost, and a Maxed Out state when all tiers are owned
Marketplace — Gift system on every theme and AI voice card; gift to any user by Discord ID with username autocomplete, validation, token deduction, and a DM to the recipient on delivery
Profile settings tab — set your bio directly from the marketplace without needing a bot command

groups.title: Bug Fixes
items: .server — channel counts (text, voice, categories) now correct; was always showing 0 because the channel cache wasn't being populated before filtering
.server — role names now displayed sorted by position; was showing the count with no names
.profile — active pet now shows correctly; was reading from a non-existent file instead of pets_v2.json
AFK notifications no longer loop — the bot's own reply contained a mention which re-triggered the handler indefinitely
.give / .deposit / .withdraw half — now correctly calculates 50% of your balance; was passing the literal string 'half' causing balance corruption
Autofish marketplace card had a missing closing div — caused the Themes and Profile tabs to be completely hidden for every user
Duplicate .trade and .work command handlers removed — the second unreachable case was silently dropped
Unresolvable users no longer show as Unknown on leaderboards
Blacklisted users now show a blocked indicator on the leaderboard

versions.title: AI Voices & TTS Overhaul
versions.description: ElevenLabs AI voice integration with 4,800+ voices in the marketplace, daily usage limits, and economy bug fixes.

groups.title: ElevenLabs AI Voices
items: 4,843 AI voices available — Standard (1 token) and Premium (2 tokens) tiers
3,000 character daily limit per user
Use .changevoice <name> to activate an owned AI voice
Owned voices listed in .changevoice output

groups.title: Marketplace — AI Voices Tab
items: New AI Voices tab with 4,800+ browsable voice cards
Live search bar with category filters: All / Standard / Premium / Owned
Gift voices to other users via the card menu
Paginated display — 48 cards per page with Load More

groups.title: Help Command
items: TTS section now appears in .cmds index as [tts]
Voice commands (play, stop, joinvc, leavevc) moved to dedicated [vc] section
Media section now only contains GIF and YouTube commands

groups.title: Bug Fixes
items: Fixed .give @user half — 'half' now correctly gives 50% of your balance
Fixed .deposit half and .withdraw half with same correction
Previously 'half' was passed as a literal string causing balance corruption

versions.title: Profile Cards & Theme System
versions.description: Full profile card system, theme marketplace, and XP tracking overhaul.

groups.title: Profile Cards
items: .profile / .p — renders your custom profile card
.rep @user — give +1 rep (24h cooldown per person)
Card shows level, global rank, XP bar, rep, stats, bio, badges

groups.title: Theme System
items: 14 themes across Standard, Premium, Seasonal & Exclusive tiers
Themes cost Tokens — buy & equip from the marketplace website
Each theme has a unique color scheme; 7 have custom pixel-art backgrounds
Exclusive themes (Legend Gold, Founders) are earned, not purchased

groups.title: XP Overhaul
items: XP now tracks server messages + group commands combined
Chat Activity stat shows server messages only
Global XP shows total combined activity
Level-up rank checks use total activity

groups.title: Website
items: Marketplace — Improved Profile Themes tab with category filters
Marketplace — Improved Profile Settings tab (set bio, more coming)
Bio/About set from website, no longer a bot command

versions.title: Quality of Life Update
versions.description: Help command overhaul, shorthand amount support across all economy commands, and leaderboard improvements.

groups.title: Help Command
items: .help now opens an index page listing all categories with shortcut keys
.help <key> jumps directly to a section (e.g. .help f for fishing)
Visual redesign — cleaner dividers, section key shown in header

groups.title: Shorthand Amounts
items: All economy & gambling commands now accept k/m/b/t suffixes
Decimal values supported — e.g. 2.7m, 1.5k, 0.5b
Applies to: deposit, withdraw, give, rob, bet, flip, slots, blackjack, plinko, mines, ladders, wheel, coinstreak, invest, diffuser, rune

groups.title: Leaderboard
items: Unresolvable users no longer appear as Unknown on the leaderboard
Blacklisted users are marked with 🚫

versions.title: Economy Overhaul
versions.description: A sweeping overhaul of core economy and gambling systems — fixing broken mechanics, adding real risk/reward, and introducing pets, job levels, and more.

groups.title: Gambling Fixes
items: Slots — weighted rarity, fixed pair detection
Coinflip — pick heads or tails before flipping
Blackjack — 3:2 natural BJ, upfront bet, double down
Spin — legendary tier now reachable (~1%), rarity label

groups.title: Mines & Ladders
items: Mines — multiplierBoost applied, bonuses on cashout
Mines — 5-minute idle timeout forfeits bet
Ladders — left/right choice now affects success odds
Rob — 70% success chance, catch penalty added

groups.title: New Systems
items: Pet system — adopt, train, battle, release
Job levels — 10 tiers with XP and multiplier bonuses
Fish encyclopedia — .fishbook with seasonal bonuses
Cooldown persistence — survive bot restarts

groups.title: Quality of Life
items: Leaderboard — total wealth (wallet + bank), rebirth tag
Leaderboard — fixed box-drawing borders
Removed stock market system

versions.title: Automation & Web Marketplace
versions.description: Introduction of the Web-based Marketplace and the new Autofishing system.

groups.title: Web Marketplace
items: Discord OAuth login on website
Buy access items online (e.g. Autofish Access)
Refined web UI

groups.title: Autofishing
items: Unlock Autofishing from the Marketplace
Bot automatically fishes for you while active
Includes a 2-hour daily usage limit

groups.title: Commands
items: .autofish on|off — Toggle auto-fishing

versions.title: Fishing Overhaul
versions.description: Major fishing system overhaul — mythical tier fish, random cast events, streak bonuses, bait consumables, and a fully reworked stat display.

groups.title: New Fish & Tiers
items: Mythical tier — 4 ultra-rare fish (5M–50M coins)
2 new legendary fish added
4 new rare fish (Void Eel, Abyssal Angler...)
8 new common/uncommon fish

groups.title: Cast Events
items: Double catch — reel in two at once
Treasure — find bonus coins on the line
Lucky cast — rare chance doubled that throw
Escape, storm, shark, junk events

groups.title: Streak & Bait
items: Streak system — up to 3x value at 100 casts
Bait consumables (Worm to Cosmic Bait)
.fishshop buy <bait> to purchase bait
All 55 rods now have rare-chance scaling

versions.title: Dice Duel PvP Gambling
versions.description: Player-vs-player dice gambling. Challenge others to high-stakes dice rolls to test your luck.

groups.title: Dice Duel
items: Challenge players to dice duels
60s time limit to accept
Higher roll wins the bet
Ties — no coins exchanged

groups.title: Details
items: Support for all/half betting
Balance verification
30s cooldown between rounds
Visual dice roll results

versions.title: Romance & Economy Expansion
versions.description: Major romance system expansion with new gambling games and enhanced fishing economy impacts.

groups.title: Romance
items: Items affect romance success
Protection items included
Mood enhancers
.stopuse command

groups.title: Economy Games
items: Coin Flip — double or nothing
Bank Heist — team robberies
Fishing — Improved rare catches

versions.title: Advanced Upgrade System
versions.description: Seven unique upgrades enhancing every aspect of gameplay progression and efficiency.

groups.title: Upgrades
items: Lucky Gambler — +12% winnings
Robbery Protection — -15% losses
Bank Interest — 0.5% daily
Energy Booster — -10% cooldowns
